# RepoLens

> Explore any GitHub codebase as an interactive, living map instead of a static
> folder tree. Paste a repo, fly through its architecture, and ask questions in
> plain language — understand a project in minutes, not days.

RepoLens is an AI-powered codebase navigator built with Next.js. It ingests a
public GitHub repository and produces an interactive dependency graph, a
symbol-level knowledge graph, AI architecture overviews, per-file summaries, a
generated README, and grounded natural-language Q&A. Semantic search runs
entirely in the browser via on-device embeddings (Transformers.js + WebAssembly
+ IndexedDB), so code never leaves the user's device.

## Features

- Interactive architecture & dependency graph for any language
- Knowledge graph of functions, classes, interfaces and their relationships
- In-browser semantic (embedding) search — private, offline after first load
- AI overviews, file summaries, README generation, and Q&A
- Per-user history and a usage dashboard
- Free and Pro plans
